subject: IBAS Alert n. 5996: not a GRB
body:
D.Gotz, on behalf of the IBAS Localization Team report:

like for IBAS trigger n. 5995, the IBAS trigger n.5996 is not due to a GRB, but to the galactic transient 1A0535+26, currently in outburst, that was not automatically recognized due to inaccurate attitude information.
